returnForm.title: Aitisi epistrofis proiontos
returnForm.noEligibleItems: Den vrethikan proionta pou pliroun tis proipotheseis gia epistrofi.
returnForm.errorSelectItem: Parakalou epilexte toulachiston ena proion gia epistrofi.
returnForm.errorSelectReason: Parakalou epilexte logo epistrofis gia ola ta proionta.

success.title: I aitisi epistrofis stalthike
success.message: I aitisi epistrofis sas stalthike me epitichia. Tha tin elegxoume kai tha epikoinonisou me mazi sas sintoma.
success.checkStatus: Mporite na parakolouthisete tin katastasi tis epistrofis sas sto istoriko paraggelion.

error.generic: Kati pige strava. Parakalou prospathiste xana.
error.windowExpired: I prothesmia epistrofis gia afti tin paraggelia echei lixei.
error.existingReturn: Iparchi idi aitisi epistrofis gia afti tin paraggelia.
